.nodes(), function (v) {
    var node = g.node(v);
    if (node.dummy === 'selfedge') {
      var selfNode = g.node(node.e.v);
      var x = selfNode.x + selfNode.width / 2;
      var y = selfNode.y;
      var dx = node.x - x;
      var dy = selfNode.height / 2;
      g.setEdge(node.e, node.label);
      g.removeNode(v);
      node.label.points = [
        { x: x + (2 * dx) / 3, y: y - dy },
        { x: x + (5 * dx) / 6, y: y - dy },
        { x: x + dx, y: y },
        { x: x + (5 * dx) / 6, y: y + dy },
        { x: x + (2 * dx) / 3, y: y + dy },
      ];
      node.label.x = node.x;
      node.label.y = node.y;
    }
  });
}
